data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. GARY'S CRAFTY profiles well and boxed nicely for his debut. Did win a four dog trial (17.21) on this track over 295m. Expected to have ability and can go close in this field. 5. HOMEBUSH JOJO stalked the lead after a clean break from the tricky draw and went on to finish second (17.42) at this track in a Class 0 over 295m. Had won a trial on this track over 295m prior to debut run. Expected to be in the finish again. 6. HOMEBUSH EILISH has missed the frame at her last couple but wasn't beaten far three back when second (23.50) at Ascot Park in a Class 0. Has the ability and expected to do much better. 3. HOMEBUSH WARDEN has claims fresh from a recent placing.","runners":[2,5,6,3],"exclusive":false}
